tasks.label: dev: stop SWA (graceful)
args: pids=$(lsof -ti:4281 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [[ -n "$pids" ]]; then echo "Stopping SWA: $pids"; kill -TERM $pids 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 2; pids2=$(lsof -ti:4281 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [[ -n "$pids2" ]]; then echo "Force killing remaining: $pids2"; kill -KILL $pids2 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi; echo 'Port freed.'

tasks.label: dev: restart SWA (graceful, via nvm Node 20)
args: pids=$(lsof -ti:4281 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [[ -n "$pids" ]]; then echo "Stopping SWA: $pids"; kill -TERM $pids 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 2; fi; pids2=$(lsof -ti:4281 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null || true); if [[ -n "$pids2" ]]; then echo "Force killing remaining: $pids2"; kill -KILL $pids2 2>/dev/null || true; fi; echo 'Restarting SWA...' && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && npx -y @azure/static-web-apps-cli start ${workspaceFolder} --port 4281
